tags.label: merchant
tags.description: Shrewd purveyor of goods and information who navigates bureaucracy, black markets, and warzones to secure profit and scarce supplies.

tags.label: home-single
tags.description: Maintains a single permanent dwelling as their sole residence and base of operations.

tags.label: home-shared
tags.description: Resides in a communal hab-unit or dwelling with others, sharing scarce resources, chores, and mutual obligations that affect privacy, security, and local reputation.

tags.label: lodging
tags.description: Imperial accommodations—anything from squalid hab-block bunks and pilgrim hostels to guarded officer cabins—providing rest, modest comforts, gear storage, and temporary safety from the hive's hazards.

tags.label: workplace-tavern
tags.description: Works in a tavern—serving drinks, handling rowdy patrons and brawls, and navigating the gossip, debts, and illicit dealings that circulate there.

tags.label: workplace-temple
tags.description: A ritualized workplace where clerics, functionaries, and servitors perform sanctified labor to maintain reliquaries, sacred machinery, and the cult's strict bureaucratic hierarchy.

tags.label: workplace-shop
tags.description: Operates or is employed in a retail shop—managing stock, haggling with customers and suppliers, and navigating the dangers and regulations of Imperium Nihilus' marketplaces.

tags.label: workplace-warehouse
tags.description: Sprawling industrial storage facilities within the Imperium’s logistics network where bulk provisions, armaments, salvage and requisitioned goods are sorted, inventoried and dispatched under rigid regulations and relentless labor.

tags.label: workplace-vessel-controls
tags.description: The vessel's helm and control consoles where piloting, navigation, power distribution and system commands are executed and managed.

tags.label: guard
tags.description: Disciplined sentry committed to protecting people, locations, and assets through relentless vigilance, perimeter defense, and forceful interception of threats.

tags.label: clerk
tags.description: Paperwork specialist who maintains records, processes permits, deciphers arcane Imperial regulations, and exploits bureaucratic loopholes to secure access and favors.

tags.label: laborer
tags.description: Hardened, low-status manual worker accustomed to long shifts in manufactorums, forges, or mines, with high endurance and practical skill but little education or social standing.

tags.label: soldier
tags.description: Disciplined frontline combatant trained in tactics, firearms, and close-quarters fighting, accustomed to following orders, holding formations, and sustaining operations under harsh battlefield conditions.
